title: verbascum × ustulatum
intro: Verbascum × ustulatum, also known as mullein, is a hybrid plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × ustulatum lie in its leaves, flowers, and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of mullein include soothing coughs and respiratory issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and promoting relaxation and sleep. Mullein is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and skin irritations.
